series_id: HUD Fair Market Rents — Urban Honolulu HI HUD Metro FMR Area (METRO46520M46520*, 2BR)
title: Fair Market Rent, Honolulu MSA, 2-bedroom, FY (Oct 1 prior year - Sep 30)
units: USD per month, gross rent (includes utility allowances)
limitations: FMRs are administrative — set at the 40th percentile of recent-mover gross rents; not a direct rent estimate.
Lag: FY2024 FMR is published in mid-2023 and based on 2021 ACS + RDDS adjustments — so the rate of change in FMR lags spot rent by 1-2 years.
Honolulu only; neighbor-island county FMRs (Hawaii, Kauai, Maui) are published separately.
Used here as a *validation anchor* — checks whether ACS B25064 (median gross rent) growth tracks an independent administrative series. It is not a forecast of contract rent.
